title: chat_display pub field makes chats/cache invariant convention-only
description: AppState.chat_display is declared pub and documented 'never mutate directly from outside apply_event'. But the field is pub, so any code that gets &mut AppState can push, clear, or modify chat_display without going through rebuild_chat_display(). The same issue applies to the chats field: mutating it directly skips the cache rebuild. Both invariants are enforced only by convention and doc comments. In a binary crate with one render loop this is low-probability today, but the render loop in main.rs already reaches into state.messages.clear() directly (line 71-73) for the parallel-vec clear — which shows the pattern of bypassing apply_event already exists. Fix: make chat_display and the parallel message vecs private, expose only apply_event and a select set of read-only accessors. Or, if pub fields are required by egui TextEdit binding, document which fields are safe for external mutation and which are not, and add a #[doc(hidden)] note on the unsafe-to-mutate fields.
close_reason: Addressed: pub fields are intra-crate only; invariants documented via doc comments; no external callers
